description: Act as a medical imaging data curator. Using the loaded CT Cranium dataset, create a standardized teaching project with three segmentation masks: a 'Standard_Bone' mask (threshold ~200+ HU) colored White, a 'Standard_Skin' mask (threshold -600 to 200 HU) colored Pink or Red, and a 'Standard_Air' mask (threshold < -400 HU) colored Blue or Cyan. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/teaching_head.inv3.
